experience.title: Senior Software Engineer
responsibilities: Led full-stack development (FastAPI/Next.js 15/Streamlit) of two key platforms, serving engineering teams with project management and real-time scheduling visualization.
Designed and implemented a sophisticated constraint programming scheduler using Google OR-Tools CP-SAT to optimize multi-objective workforce allocation with complex skill-based constraints.
Engineered robust backend microservices with FastAPI, SQLModel, and PostgreSQL/SQLite, supporting RESTful APIs for complex project hierarchy management and full CRUD operations.
Integrated the Jira Data Center API for bi-directional synchronization and built automated notification systems (APScheduler/SMTP) for project milestones and status updates.
Established production-ready CI/CD pipelines using Docker containerization, Docker Compose orchestration, and GitLab runners for automated deployment.
Ensured system quality and reliability through comprehensive type-safe data models (Zod/SQLModel/Pydantic), a full test framework (pytest), and an observability stack (Grafana/Loki) for monitoring.

experience.title: Backend Engineer
responsibilities: Developed and maintained core backend systems for the company's website using Python and the Django framework.
Engineered and documented RESTful APIs to support various website features, including user authentication and product data management.
Optimized database interactions and resolved critical issues to ensure high reliability and fast response times for key website functions.
Collaborated with front-end teams to integrate new features and enhance overall site performance.

projects.name: LLM Wiki - Agentic Knowledge Retrieval System
projects.description: An autonomous AI-maintained personal knowledge base that replaces traditional RAG with a persistent, interlinked markdown wiki. Built with Python, Obsidian, and SHA-256 incremental tracking for compounding knowledge synthesis.

projects.name: Manim Video Generator - Browser-Based Mathematical Animation Renderer
projects.description: A full-stack platform for writing Manim Python code in a Monaco Editor and rendering mathematical animations in real-time via sandboxed Docker containers with AST-based security validation and live WebSocket progress streaming.

projects.name: CLC3.tech - Combining Codeforces, Leetcode & Codechef
projects.description: Developed a full-stack platform (clc3.tech) using Next.js/Python that unifies and constantly updates user performance data (ratings, submissions, contests) from Codeforces, Leetcode, and Codechef into a single, comprehensive social leaderboard.

achievements.title: Smart India Hackathon Grand Finalist
